description:
Get ready to laugh until it hurts! In this week’s episode of Funniest Pets of the Week, we’ve rounded up the absolute best, most viral, and most ridiculous clips from the animal kingdom. From pets with zero boundaries to high-speed zoomies that end in hilarious fails, this compilation has it all.  We've got all the newest REAL viral animals on Beyoncé's Internet!  

What video was your favorite?! We like the opossum momma and the photobombing dog. 

We're the happy place for animal lovers!  You’

title: Am I Still Your Sweet Baby?!?! 🥰 | FUNNIEST Pets of the Week!
